title: Ostinia cotoneaster
taxonomy: Ostinia cotoneaster is classified as a genus and species within the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the rose family. The genus Ostinia is a small group of flowering plants, and Ostinia cotoneaster is one of its species. It is native to Asia and is also found in other parts of the world. This plant is often used as an ornamental and has small white flowers that are followed by red berries. As a member of the Rosaceae family, Ostinia cotoneaster shares characteristics with other rose family members such as fruit development and flower structure.
